LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS GEORGE BIRMINGHAM, AND THE BIRMINGHAM GROUP, INC'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO 9TH CAUSE OF ACTION TO PLEAD FACTS ABOUT THE SPECIFIC NATURE OF THE FRAUD. NO FACTS ALLEGED AS TO WHAT SPECIFICALLY WAS CONCEALED, BY WHOM, AND UNDER WHAT DUTY. PLAINTIFF MUST PLEAD FACTS AS TO KNOWLEDGE OF THE DEFECTS, INTENT TO CONCEAL, AND WHEN, AND BY WHOM CONCEALING REPRESENTATIONS WERE MADE. DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO 10TH CAUSE OF ACTION BECAUSE WILLFUL MISCONDUCT IS NOT A CAUSE OF ACTION. PLAINTIFF CAN RECOVER PUNITIVE DAMAGES FROM THEIR OTHER INTENTIONAL TORT AND RELATED CAUSES OF ACTION. NO REASONABLE PROBABILITY THAT DEFECT CAN BE CURED BY AMENDMENT. (MOVING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD; COURT REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-28-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS GEORGE BIRMINGHAM, and, THE BIRMINGHAM GROUP, INC. DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Demurrer sustained with 10 days leave to amend as to 9th cause of action to plead facts about the specific nature of the fraud. No facts alleged as to what specifically was concealed, by whom, and under what duty. Plaintiff must plead facts as to knowledge of the defects, intent to conceal, and when, and by whom concealing representations were made. Demurrer sustained without leave to amend as to 10th cause of action because willful misconduct is not a cause of action. Plaintiff can recover punitive damages from their other intentional tort and related causes of action. No reasonable probability that defect can be cured by amendment. (Moving party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797
